title: echium angustifolium subsp. elongatum
intro: Echium angustifolium subsp. elongatum, also known as the tall echium or tall spurflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the southwestern part of North America and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Echium angustifolium subsp. elongatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and supplements.
